fields.name: Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for the dimension.

fields.name: Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the dimension code you enter in the Code field.

fields.name: Code Caption
fields.tooltip: Specifies the caption of the dimension code. This is displayed as the name of dimension code fields.

fields.name: Filter Caption
fields.tooltip: Specifies the caption of the dimension code when used as a filter. This is displayed as the name of dimension filter fields.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies a description of the dimension code.

fields.name: Blocked
fields.tooltip: Specifies that the related record is blocked from being posted in transactions, for example a customer that is declared insolvent or an item that is placed in quarantine.

fields.name: Consolidation Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code that is used for consolidation.

fields.name: Map-to IC Dimension Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies which intercompany dimension corresponds to the dimension on the line.
